hero_subtitle: SFTY equips leadership with a unified compliance operating view that links provider outputs, audit evidence, and risk signals for clear, scalable decision oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams lack a consolidated view of compliance performance across fragmented tools and case management systems. This gap slows risk detection, weakens audit readiness and limits clear decision transparency at the executive level.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, case workflows, decision logs and audit evidence into a unified dashboard that delivers clear visibility and risk control for VASP leadership teams.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to executive view
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates provider checks, rules, alerts and cases into structured compliance data for a clear and auditable executive performance overview.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented visibility. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives a consolidated compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into clear workflows, audit-ready evidence, and scalable operational risk visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with consolidated compliance insights, audit-ready evidence and secure deployment to strengthen risk oversight and support bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide executives with compliance visibility
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows translate to executive dashboards
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports board risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY consolidates provider outputs for leadership
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a consolidated view of compliance performance, risk control, audit readiness and case management across digital asset workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY consolidate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from multiple providers into connected workflows, cases, decisions and reports to reduce manual work and improve compliance visibility.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools by structuring their outputs into one controlled compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence and executive dashboards.
final_title: Consolidate executive compliance visibility with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, risk signals and audit evidence into a connected compliance operating view.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
